Secondly the room wasn't clean when handled over to us, the 'single bed' area was totally mess and the bedsheet not being changed. I doubt they will sanitize the room before handing over to next guest!!!! 

I would not recommend this hotel to anyone as they hv lousy team and rude staff esepcially the receptionist! Think twice before you place yr booking!

reviews.title: Disappointing Stay!

The location, cleanliness and staff service was subpar. The hot water service in the bathroom was inconsistent, you had to wait for at least 5 to 10 minutes for the water to get hot to take a shower after a long day of being out and about. The bathroom lacked maintenance and was not clean at all. On a positive note, the hotel provided free spa service and nail service. The Wi-Fi connection was reliable and hotel was very tech savvy but the overall experience was far from ideal.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
I am writing to express my disappointment with the experience we had during our stay at Sojourn Spa Hotel Ipoh on the evening of January 6th and 7th, This was unfortunately, the most unsatisfactory accommodation experience of our entire trip to Malaysia.

When we first entered the room, we were extremely disappointed to find the following issues:

1.Cleanliness Issues: The floor has visible hair and dust that had not been cleaned properly. The walls, curtains, and bed were stained with unacceptable and highly noticeable marks. The bathroom tiles were covered with yellowish-brown mold in the grout, and the ceiling had strange yellow spots.
2.Unpleasant Odor: The room had a strange and unbearable smell, completely different from the pleasant scent of the aromatherapy used in the hallway. This odor caused discomfort, and my husband even developed a headache because of it.

We contacted the hotel staff, who acknowledged that the smell was unusual and said they had never encountered it in other rooms. The staff provided an aromatherapy machine in an attempt to mask the odor, but we found this to be an inadequate solution and requested a room change.

Although the new room did not have the odor issue, we discovered another problem: the bathroom’s drainage system was entirely non-functional. While our two young children were in the middle of their baths, they had to stop and wait for the staff to address the issue. Eventually, after all the repairs and adjustments, our family was only able to rest at 12:30 AM, utterly exhausted and frustrated.

This was the third hotel we stayed at during our trip, following hotels in Malacca and Kuala Lumpur, both of which provided us with excellent experiences. In stark contrast, Sojourn Spa Hotel Ipoh fell far short of our expectations and failed to live up to its reputation. This disappointing experience not only disrupted our rest but also negatively impacted our overall trip.

reviews.title: Manage ur expectation
reviews.text:
My stay was okay, but comparing with the price I paid (RM385 per night), I really skeptical about it. First thing to highlight, cleanliness not up to standard. You can clearly see black stain around bathroom, especially the shower hose. I recommend to use MAGICLEAN to remove stain and mold, just spray and leave it. No scrubs required. Mold on ceiling and wallpaper. As well as dirty on painted wall. My room is right in front of elevator, so noise can be heard. The only good things about the room is it smell good. 
I’m not sure if all rooms type has the same problem, or maybe it is because my room type is the cheapest in their menu. But I really think my room is a defective product to put on shelf for sale. 

About customer service, nothing much to complaint. But one point to highlight. Me and my girlfriend went for massage, two to a room, and they assigned one male masseur and one female masseur. We don’t feel comfortable to have a male masseur in the same room as my girlfriend is half naked. Then we requested separate room. Not complaining abt this part, but they could have been more sensitive and considerate.  

A good point to highlight, Mama Kim restaurant is just downstairs. 

With this room rate, I can say it should be top 5 in Ipoh. I expected a lot, and I fell hard.

reviews.title: Price vs Value

We went with our two teenage kids; although the place is really clean the set up of the room did not have much thought gone into it. 

The wash sink is in the room and the toilet and bath is inside the room and when you are with others (not your spouse) its a little awkward as there is no privacy. The room should be properly partitioned. 

The coffee and tea making is in a common area outside the room. At about 1130pm there were folks making merry loudly over there,  while we were trying to sleep after a long day out. 

Its a nice location but needs a little attention to privacy and redesign of the rooms. 

This is my opinion, just one person. Experience it for yourself; maybe your thoughts are not aligned to mine. 

Cheers.

reviews.title: Terrible, would not recommend the Deluxe rooms
reviews.text: We stayed for 2 nights at te Deluxe room on the 1st floor. The first night we couldn't sleep at all because the air condition was making don't weird noises the whole night. The next day we requested to change rooms but they didn't change our room despite the hotel not being full and instead they told us that they changed the filter when we were not there. The air con made even more noises than the day before but we decided to get it over with since it was the last night. They didn't even clean our room or made the bed. In my opinion this is one of those cost saving boutique hotels which is common in town where the owner wants to spend the least money in the construction. The sound proofing is bad. I could hear kids running and jumping on the upper floors. You hear people opening their room doors, water running down the pipes. This is not a hotel for relaxation even when they have an in-house Herbaline beauty salon. It's better to take the top floor suites with loft since they use better air con units and higher ceilings. However the mattress on the Loft is tatami style and it's hard because my other family member slept there in those rooms. I don't think i will return unless I have no choice or to take the suites on the 3rd floor. I like that this is a eco friendly hotel but again please use some practicality. You wanted people to refill their own water bottles but the water dispenser height is just impossible to refill the given bottles without spilling!

reviews.title: The stay was average
reviews.text:
Stayed one night at Sojourn Spa Hotel Greentown Ipoh in December 2024, booking the Duplex King room. The room comes with a king-sized bed on the ground floor and a mezzanine floor equipped with a single thin mattress.

Room Insights:
Room Type: Not recommended for two or three guests. For two pax, the upper floor feels unnecessary. For three pax, the sleeping arrangement on the mezzanine floor seems uncomfortable.

Air Conditioning: Features a cassette-type unit, which functions well due to the high ceiling.

Amenities: The room includes basic amenities. The size is compact but adequate for a one-night stay.

Atmosphere: The hotel has a lemongrass aroma, thanks to the essential oils used.

Check-In Experience:
Agoda Check-In Time: Stated as 2 PM, but the receptionist clarified that the actual check-in time is 3 PM. Arrived around 1 PM+ but was informed no rooms were ready. Received a call at 2:30 PM confirming the room was ready.

Comfort and Noise Issues:
Bed Comfort: The bed is comfortable, but the room has poor soundproofing.
Noise Disturbances: Could hear doors opening and people passing by the corridor. Light sleepers may struggle, especially if sleeping early.

Parking: Limited parking spaces but manageable during my stay.

Overall Impression:
The stay was average. While the room’s aesthetics and lemongrass aroma were pleasant, the weak soundproofing detracted from the experience. Suitable for late sleepers or short stays, but the Duplex King room layout may not offer the best value or comfort.

reviews.text:
We stayed at Sojourn Spa Hotel Ipoh and really loved the overall calm and soothing atmosphere. The hotel smells lovely the moment you walk in — like a mini spa retreat! There’s a spa and facial center located just downstairs, and we were able to book treatments right after we returned to the hotel, which was super convenient and relaxing.

The environment feels warm, peaceful, and very welcoming, perfect for a short rejuvenating stay.

However, the room cleanliness was disappointing. The floor and basin were not clean, and when we moved the bed slightly, we found a lot of dust and hair underneath — clearly not cleaned thoroughly. It was a letdown, especially given the otherwise high standards of the spa environment.

Overall, it’s a great place if you’re coming for the spa experience, but the hotel needs to step up on housekeeping to match the relaxing vibe it aims to offer.

She ignored me for over 10 minutes even when the couple she was attending was busy doing something else. The least she could do was look at me and say please wait or something. She stared at me and proceeded to ignore me. A friend who stayed here before complained about being ignored too at the spa counter. She had booked a room just for the spa service which she didn't end up doing. Neither did I. Wasted. No breakfast here either. Hot waster can be obtained from the water dispenser on each floor, which is no big deal. But hotel has no other amenities. Aircond was also pre set to go at 20c only and was placed away from the bed. The bathroom is somehow within the room and poorly ventilated, so the room gets super hot whenever we shower. The room in general was warm, and it this current summer heat, it was not a good thing. So if u are in town and need a clean place to stay with intention to eat out, good place to stay. Otherwise, not that worth it

Toilet has no lock, privacy only 70% as the mirror can see through ur shadows movement.
There is a spa inside the hotel worth to try it. A free nail buffer and a 5 minutes of head and shoulder massage will be given but u need to remind them if not they would just try to skip it. I didn't receive the five minutes massage, just got the nail buffer.
Nearby food is tandoor grill and khuntai.
Overall its ok, would go back just for the spa session.

Cons- no tea/coffee facilities in the room although there is hot water dispenser outside with teabags, didn’t see any coffee sachets.
Bedsheet had a stain. Didn’t report since it’s just an overnight stopover.

Was given an upgrade to a family room that has a king size bed and a super single bed on a loft area. Rather unnecessary as there were just 2 guests.  If not on a busy peak time, you could wait and book nearer to the date - it’s a different of almost Rm50 per night.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
We stayed at Sojourn Spa Hotel Ipoh and really loved the overall calm and soothing atmosphere. The hotel smells lovely the moment you walk in — like a mini spa retreat! There’s a spa and facial center located just downstairs, and we were able to book treatments right after we returned to the hotel, which was super convenient and relaxing.

However, the room cleanliness was disappointing. The floor and basin were not clean, and when we moved the bed slightly, we found a lot of dust and hair underneath — clearly not cleaned thoroughly. It was a letdown, especially given the otherwise high standards of the spa environment.

Overall, it’s a great place if you’re coming for the spa experience, but the hotel needs to step up on housekeeping to match the relaxing vibe it aims to offer.

reviews.text:
Feb 2020 visit

The good: 
Hotel is very new & it is quite clean. Feel very comfortable with the good interior design & lighting throughout the hotel. Location is convenient if you have a car.

The not so good:
1. Soundproofing of the room is bad. Could hear people talking, doors closing, alarms of doors blaring, dogs barking. 

2. Doors are equipped with an annoying alarm that sounds when the door don't shut properly. Could just make them shut better instead of installing the alarm. We were awakened a few times because of this happening to other rooms next to us.

3. Aircond in our room was very very very noisy. Made a loud creaking sound throughout the night as though someone is tapping the aircond loudly with a stick

Would return if there is a good deal

The room was huge and very nicely furnished. The bathroom toiletries smelled so good. This is the second hotel i have actually preferred to use hotel’s over mine. The first was le meridien. Really live up to name as a spa hotel. 
The hallways of the rooms smelled so heavenly, lemongrass? I was already relaxed before even visiting the spa located in house. The hotel provided welcome fruit and snacks which was nice. Would highly recommend.

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text:
Good hotel but don’t try their massage, service not good. Doesn’t worth the $.. I went massage almost every week in different location, most lousy service I ever had. Easily fall asleep in this cozy environment & the staff will just stop massage, they thought we don’t no. 
Hotel room very cozy and comfortable, other than hunting food in Ipoh, we rather stay in room to rest. Water very cold, need to take some time to heat up. Outside hotel room a bit noisy, soundproof need to be improve. 2nd time staying here.. overall not bad .. will still choose back same hotel but no massage.

reviews.negatives: Perhaps the air conditioning was not as great, but I was not too bothered to ask for help. Cos it was a short stay.

reviews.negatives: Aircon can be quite drying

reviews.title: Comfortable stay
reviews.text: We stayed there for one night with two young kids. They both like the place, with a spacious room and warm ambiance. The only downside is the early check-out time of 11am.

reviews.title: Best hotel in Ipoh
reviews.positives: Booked 4 different rooms and love every single one of them. They were clean, huge and comfortable. On top of that the hotel staffs are very friendly and welcoming! They went extra mile to serve the guests; my child left her favorite cardigan in the hotel and we only found out when we left the country. The hotel staff found our missing item and assisted to courier it back to us. They even called the courier company to check on the status on our behalf. Thats top notch service! Thank you Sojourn Spa Hotel. Its a hotel i highly recommend for those who are visiting Ipoh!!
reviews.negatives: There is nothing that I can find fault in!

reviews.title: Facilities improvement

Welcome drink and sugar are excellent.  Staffs are very nice and patient to answer questions.

Facilities directions are not clear and damaged shower head did not fixed before our check in.  Amenities did not top up after room clean.

reviews.title: Our repeat stay
reviews.text:
We love the smell and resort feel of this hotel. The rooms are soothing  and comfortable . The accessibility to the in-house spa makes it so pleasurable. We didn’t partake of the restaurant as food is mainly organic and plant based. 
The first time we visited we had the superior room but this room has a window that looks into the interior corridor. So we learnt our lesson and booked the deluxe room for our second visit because we want a window that lets in natural light.

reviews.title: A good hotel to try out
reviews.text:
Good location near city centre, clean & friendly staff. But need to look into the current concept which is inconvenient to the customers:-
1. Limited parking space. Hardly can accommodate 20 vehicles. The rest park at the roadside @ main road. 
2. No kettle being provided inside the room.  Hot water and tea are location outside at the common area. 
3. At lease have some coffee. Not every one drink tea.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
We have stayed several times in Sojourn. The rooms are are huge but some of the matress are in need of change as it starts to sag in the middle. Entertainment was awesome as they had a mi box in the room which allowed easy access to many app based entertainment like youtube, netflix etc. On the downside, it can get quite noisy as the insulation is not very good. You can hear the vehicles passing by as well as the noise from a club/restaurant nearby.  
Overall, it's still a good stay.

reviews.title: Nice cozy hotel
reviews.text:
Love the room layout. Thoughtful hangers near the basin and toilet for towels. Nice aroma throughout the day. 
The only negative is that hot water is not available in the room and need to go to the pantry area to take.
There’s a wellness spa in the hotel and a wellness restaurant just next to it.
A quiet and good hotel to chill and relax.

reviews.title: Enjoyed the spa
reviews.text: We enjoyed staying at this hotel. Our only issue was the wifi was not strong enough and no kettle to boil water. I had my elderly mum who needed to drink warm water. Also, no ice water or fridge in the room. Otherwise we had a pleasant stay with all the spa treatments.

During our stay, there’s construction going on the first floor so it’s really not nice when you are taking afternoon nap.  Design of the room is cosy and modern but the layout of toilet and shower room really got no privacy. If it’s family or couple , maybe can still tolerate , but I guess if you are traveling with friends or colleagues , you may curse and swear haha !
